title: brachyscome diversifolia
intro: Brachyscome diversifolia, also known as the native daisy or silver daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, and has been traditionally used to treat skin conditions and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Brachyscome diversifolia are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
